scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json tsconfig.base.json eslint.config.mjs .github/workflows/*.yml packages/*/package.json packages/*/tsconfig*.json packages/db/drizzle.config.ts packages/web/vite.config.ts packages/web/playwright.config.ts packages/web/playwright.auth.config.ts
scripts.ci:typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/engine typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/api typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/data typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/web typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/web typecheck:tools
scripts.ci:test: bun run --cwd packages/engine test && bun run --cwd packages/db test && bun run --cwd packages/api test
scripts.ci: bun run ci:format && bun run ci:lint && bun run ci:typecheck && bun run ci:test && bun run ci:build
